title: Bonded substrate peripheral laser processing method and substrate processing apparatus thereof
abstract: A substrate processing method of a combined substrate in which a first substrate having a surface film stacked thereon and a second substrate are bonded to each other includes separating the first substrate as a removing target from the second substrate; and removing or modifying at least a surface layer of the surface film at a peripheral portion of the second substrate by radiating laser light to an exposed surface of the surface film remaining at the peripheral portion of the second substrate, the exposed surface being exposed as a result of the separating of the first substrate.
claims: 1. A substrate processing method of a combined substrate in which a first substrate having a surface film stacked thereon and a second substrate are bonded to each other, the substrate processing method comprising: separating the first substrate as a removing target from the second substrate; and removing or modifying at least a surface layer of the surface film at a peripheral portion of the second substrate by radiating laser light to an exposed surface of the surface film remaining at the peripheral portion of the second substrate, the exposed surface being exposed as a result of the separating of the first substrate.
